message:
test(core): add comprehensive unit tests across 7 core modules

Adds ~1741 lines of new unit tests across alerts, email_notify, ipc,
native_events, orphan_reaper, runtime_compat, and session_pane_state:

alerts.rs (+223 lines):
- AlertPeriod/AlertMetric parse error messages include unknown variant text
- AlertLevel as_str/Display consistency for all variants
- AlertLevel::from_percent negative input returns None
- TriggeredAlert::summary() for rate limit and account balance metrics
- AlertRule constructors (cost, token_usage, rate_limit, account_balance) set
  expected fields including metric, threshold, period, account_id
- Serde roundtrip for AlertMetric, AlertPeriod, AlertLevel (all variants)
- Negative threshold never triggers
- sum_amounts empty slice returns 0.0
- evaluate_alert_rules with cost/token/rate_limit/balance metrics
- Per-agent and per-account filtering in evaluate_alert_rules
- Disabled rules are skipped during evaluation

email_notify.rs (+331 lines):
- EmailConfig validation: valid config passes, missing/empty fields fail
- EmailConfig serde roundtrip and Debug output stability
- EmailTemplate rendering with subject, body, and template variable substitution
- Template rendering with missing variables returns placeholder markers
- Template rendering with HTML special characters escapes correctly
- Notification batching: single alert, multiple alerts, dedup by rule_id
- Rate limiting: first notification allowed, rapid repeat suppressed, cooldown
  window expiry re-enables notification

ipc.rs (+519 lines):
- recv_shutdown() for non-unix platform impls (asupersync dual-runtime compat)
- 35+ pure-function unit tests for rpc_required_scope(): send/approve → Write,
  state/events → Read, workflow run/abort → Write vs status → Read,
  accounts refresh → Write vs list → Read, reservations reserve/release → Write
  vs list → Read, empty args → Write
- IpcRequest::required_scope() for all request variants (UserVar, Ping, Status,
  PaneState, SetPanePriority, ClearPanePriority, Rpc)
- IpcScope ordering: Read < Write, PartialOrd
- IpcRequest serde roundtrip for all variants
- IpcResponse serde roundtrip for success, error, events payloads
- IpcAuthConfig serde roundtrip and Debug output
- IpcToken validation: valid token accepted, expired token rejected, wrong
  scope rejected, malformed token rejected
- Request size limit enforcement with configurable max

native_events.rs (+140 lines):
- NativeEvent construction and field access
- Event ID uniqueness across sequential construction
- Timestamp monotonicity verification
- Event serde roundtrip for all payload types
- Event filtering by type and pane_id
- Batch processing preserves ordering guarantees

orphan_reaper.rs (+82 lines):
- OrphanReaper detection of stale PID files
- Reaper skips active processes
- Reaper handles missing PID directory
- Reaper handles malformed PID file content
- Reaper respects configurable staleness threshold
- Serde roundtrip for ReaperConfig

runtime_compat.rs (+248 lines):
- Mutex: lock_and_read, lock_and_mutate, sequential_locks
- RwLock: read, write, multiple_sequential_readers
- Semaphore: available_permits, acquire_decrements, release_on_drop,
  acquire_many, try_acquire_insufficient_fails
- mpsc channel: send/recv, bounded capacity enforcement, channel closure
  detection, multiple_senders fan-in
- oneshot channel: send/recv, closed detection, drop sender signals error
- Notify: notify_one wakes waiter, notify_waiters wakes all
- sleep: completes after duration
- timeout: completes within deadline, expired returns error

session_pane_state.rs (+198 lines):
- PaneState construction and field defaults
- PaneState serde roundtrip for all state variants
- SessionPaneMap insert, get, remove, iteration
- Pane state transitions (idle → active → suspended → closed)
- State timestamp tracking on transitions
- Multi-pane session state consistency
- Stale pane detection with configurable timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
